title: FireSat: first 3 operational wildfire satellites in orbit

scenes.text: Google just put a *smoke detector* in orbit
scenes.voiceSegment: Google just put a smoke detector in orbit.

scenes.text: 3 FireSat satellites reached orbit this week
scenes.voiceSegment: Three FireSat satellites reached orbit this week on a SpaceX rideshare. It is the start of an operational constellation built to watch for wildfires.

scenes.label: smallest fire it can spot
scenes.voiceSegment: Their infrared sensors can spot a fire as small as five by five meters, even through smoke and clouds.

scenes.text: Google AI checks each pixel against 1,000 past images
scenes.voiceSegment: Google's AI compares every new image with the last thousand views of the same spot, plus local weather, to confirm a real ignition.

scenes.label: global updates, 50+ sats by early 2030s
scenes.voiceSegment: The plan: more than fifty satellites by the early twenty thirties, updating every point on Earth every twenty minutes.
